name: serez-ui
description: UI library for Serez-Code — Virtual DOM (optimized with event-driven render + frame-skip), JSX translator, Window/State/Effects, TUI + GUI renderers, unified focus + keyboard nav, built-in components (Button, Input, Textarea, Select, Dropdown, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Slider, ProgressBar, Label, Link, Row/Col), CSS con lógica (.szs), flexbox layout engine
author: Sergio3215
